name: protegrity-data-protection
description: Customer-friendly Protegrity AI Developer Edition workflows for Cursor. Discover, redact, protect, scan, generate synthetic data, and anonymize without MCP.
longDescription: This plugin helps Cursor users complete Protegrity Developer Edition tasks in a guided, customer-driven way. It focuses on the features new users need most: data discovery, redaction, protection, guardrails, synthetic data, and anonymization. Every feature has a clear setup guide, and you only install what you use. The plugin stays out of the way and lets you drive the workflow.
